stories.title: Did New England finally get its WR1 in A.J. Brown?...
stories.summary: A.J. Brown is heading to New England at long last. Does he put the Patriots over the top, and how does he fit in the offense? And what now for the Eagles?

stories.title: A.J. Brown trade: Answering top questions on Eagle...
stories.summary: Philly sent its No. 1 receiver to New England. How the trade impacts both teams, plus your fantasy league.

stories.title: Eagles trade star WR Brown to Pats for two picks
stories.summary: The Eagles are trading star wide receiver A.J. Brown to the Patriots for a first-round draft pick in 2028 and a 2027 fifth-round pick.

stories.title: Sources: Garrett traded to Rams in blockbuster
stories.summary: The Browns have traded Myles Garrett to the Rams for Jared Verse and multiple draft picks, including a 2027 first-rounder.

stories.title: Sources: QB Wilson set to leave NFL for CBS job
stories.summary: Quarterback Russell Wilson is finalizing a deal to become a CBS Sports analyst, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.
